calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Mar-16-2009 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from the Presiding Judge Dept. 206 for Court Trial/Prove-Up Hearing. Comm: Willilam R. Gargano, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, Reporter: Lois Jones, CSR #3689.
Steven MacDonald, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Peter Huang.
No appearance by defendant Robert McConnel.
Notice of Time and Place of Trial was filed on February 24,2009.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiff Peter Huang, and against defendant Robert McConnel, an individual as follows:

Damages/Rent - $2,400.00.
Holdover Damages - $800.00.
Costs: Waived.
Total - $3,200.00.

Additionally, plaintiff Peter Huang is entitled to Restitution and Possession of the premises located at 1039 Plymouth Avneue, (bedroom in rear) San Francisco, CA 94112. The rental agreement is canceled.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-11-2009 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion To Quash Service Of Summons By Deft Robert Mcconnel; Memorandum Of P/A
Off Calendar Feb-09-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES- PETER HUANG, PLAINTIFF APPEARING IN PRO PER WITH WIFE FLORA HUANG;
ROBERT MC CONNEL, DEFENDANT APPEARING IN PRO PER.

RULING - THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING AS FOLLOWS: DEFENDANT ROBERT MCCONNEL'S Motion To Quash Service Of Summons IS GRANTED. SERVICE BY THE PLAINTIFF IS NOT PERMITTED UNDER C C P SECTION 414.10. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. Judge: Peter J. Busch, Reporter: Carol Karen CSR# 8189 =301/PJB
